bankingPartner.notes: Brazil PIX (launched 2020) enables real-time BRL settlement 24/7. TODO (wave:medium): Research Stellar BRL anchors and PIX API integration via Open Finance Brazil.

regulatoryNotes: Banco Central do Brasil (BCB) regulates forex. Capital controls compliance required for cross-border transfers above BRL 10,000.
